meta.title: Greenways Guide — specialist agent roster

specialists.prompt: What grants fit a restaurant upgrading kitchen equipment?

specialists.name: Sustainable Products
specialists.label: Search water / elec / gas kit

specialists.name: Deals Agent
specialists.label: Tariffs & product spotlights

specialists.name: Media Agent
